_generatedFrom: Generated from: apps/partner-ai-service/src/inbound/http/app.ts and src/inbound/http/routes/chat/**, plus packages/chat-protocol/src/sidechat-v1/*.ts. Hand-maintained until a generator is wired; per ADR 0004, update this artifact in the same change as any route or protocol change.

info.title: Side Chat Partner AI Service
info.description: Resumable, server-owned chat. A turn is created by POST /chat/runs (identity returned as JSON; generation is forked off the request) and then streamed or replayed by GET /chat/turns/{assistantTurnId}/stream. GET /chat/activity is a separate subject-scoped lifecycle stream. See docs/architecture/assistant-turn.md.

200.description: Available assistant models for the workspace

post.description: Start one assistant turn and stream it on this response (connection-bound streaming, ADR 0007). Pre-start runs synchronously and its failures return JSON; once the turn is accepted, generation is forked server-side and this response becomes the turn's SSE stream from sidechat.started (sequence 0, carrying assistantTurnId and conversationId) to the terminal event. Closing the response never interrupts generation; resume on the same instance with GET /chat/turns/{assistantTurnId}/stream.

200.description: The turn's SSE stream: sidechat.started (turn identity) through exactly one terminal event

404.description: replay_expired: a repeated requestId resolved to a finished turn whose stream buffer was swept; read conversation history

409.description: stream_unavailable (reason not_stream_owner): a repeated requestId resolved to a turn still running on another instance; poll GET /chat/turns/{assistantTurnId} until it finishes

get.description: Resolve a lost POST /chat/runs reply: map a client request id back to its assistant turn.

Same-instance resume: replay one turn's buffered sidechat.v1 events as Server-Sent Events. Emits events with sequence > after; a running turn tails live to the terminal, a terminal turn ends right after its replay.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Replay offset; emit events with sequence > after. Default -1 replays the whole turn.

400.description: Malformed after query parameter (must be an integer)

404.description: replay_expired (the finished turn's buffer was swept) or unknown turn; fall back to conversation history

409.description: stream_unavailable (reason not_stream_owner): the turn is running but another instance owns its live stream; poll turn status

post.description: Return a dispatched UI (host) command's result so the awaiting server tool call resolves (ADR 0009). Works on any instance: the result is validated against the durable emitted row, persisted, and relayed to the owning instance. Idempotent per (assistantTurnId, commandId).

schema.description: The HostCommandResult JSON the widget dispatched (status, resultCode, data)

200.description: { settled: true } — the result is durably recorded and relayed to the owner

400.description: Body is not a JSON object

404.description: Unknown turn, or no host command with that id was emitted for this turn (a leaked commandId cannot settle through a different turn)

post.description: Request cancellation of one turn. Writes a durable intent and notifies; the owning instance interrupts generation. CAS-acks an already-finished or unknown turn as not cancelled.

get.description: Subject-scoped turn-lifecycle stream (Server-Sent Events of type sidechat.turn-activity): a snapshot of currently-running turns on connect, then live transitions. Drives the sidebar 'generating' indicator across conversations.
List the subject's conversations for the switcher/sidebar.
Read one conversation's stored history plus its active turn (if any), so a reconnecting client can render past messages and resume an in-flight turn from one read.
